calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-05-2010 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Reset To Aug-05-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Shominic Antone Pierce-Zaid was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court requires additionall information from petitioner in order to proceed with today's proposed name change. Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to August 5, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.
